positive: A highly stylized and intricate pattern featuring stylized celestial bodies and natural elements: crescent moons, geometric constellations, stylized blooming flowers, and wandering constellations (like the Big Dipper and Andromeda). The composition is a dense, repeating, and harmonious tessellation designed for seamless print application. Use a deep indigo and gold color palette with pops of ethereal cyan. The style should be a blend of Art Deco elegance and cosmic mysticism, utilizing clean, bold silhouettes with sharp, contrasting lines. Center the main cluster elements for maximum visual impact. The composition must be optimized for a central, high-contrast, and immediately appealing textile print.
negative: blur, artifact, low quality, watermark, signature, text, logos, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, disfigured, out of focus, grain, repetitive pattern glitch
